en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: Nga’ay ho. pasifanaen no singsi samaanen sano Amisen a pasowal ko kakaenen hananay anini.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的阿美語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Ami language for food.

ab: Mafana’ay a mitengil to sowal no singsi haw?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: singsi, mafokilay kako, ngaayay ho miliyaw a somowal haw?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: awaay matengil ako, ngaayay taangayen ko ngiha haw?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: nengnengen i tini! do^doen kako a miosi.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: liyawen ho kinacecay. taangayen ko ngiha.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: Please take out the eraser.

ab: caliwen ho ko sasipasip no kapot.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pacaliwen ho kako to sasipasip haw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: tahini aca ko pinanam no mita, ancila han to a minanam.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
